headline: Solar Landscape Closes Oversubscribed $125 Million Revolving Credit Facility Led by M&T Bank
summary: ASBURY PARK, N.J., June 23, 2026--Solar Landscape, the nation's leading platform for distributed energy infrastructure built on commercial real estate, today announced the closing of an oversubscribed $125 million revolving credit facility led by M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB), with participation from Flagstar Bank, Atlantic Union Bank, and Valley Bank.
